title: koeleria hirsuta subsp. brevifolia
intro: Koeleria hirsuta subsp. brevifolia, commonly known as tall hair grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Koeleria hirsuta subsp. brevifolia include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
